Episodes.Title: Blow Out
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Andrew Loudon, Howard Teale
Episodes.Plot: The pilot of a British airliner is partially sucked out of the cockpit after his windscreen blows out in flight.

Episodes.Title: A Wounded Bird
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, James McGowan, Dwayne Hill
Episodes.Plot: Can a damaged engine bring down a modern multi-engine aircraft? The story of Atlantic Southeast Airlines flight 529.

Episodes.Title: Hijacked
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jean Pearson, Jean-Michel Nadeau
Episodes.Plot: Air France Flight 8969 has been hijacked. How can the authorities deal with the hijackers and save all passengers on-board?

Episodes.Title: Deadly Crossroads
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Bob Desrosiers, Stephen Sparks
Episodes.Plot: A DHL cargo plane collides with a Russian passenger jet over southern Germany in 2002.

Episodes.Title: Crash On The Mountain
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Don Allison, John Watson
Episodes.Plot: Another proof that a series of small mishaps can amount to one deadly crash. Pilot errors, inoperative ground equipment and arrogance pile on one after another and end in a tragic disaster.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Delay
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Andy Velasquez, Peter Nelson
Episodes.Plot: Can a plane fall out of the sky without a single technical problem on-board? Yet another story of communications break-down resulting in a tragic loss of life.
